goal: Analyze old DB, design new schema, define API contracts, scaffold project

epic.description: Goal: Analyze the legacy MSSQL database, design the target PostgreSQL schema, define all API contracts, design the sync service, and document all architectural decisions. No production code written in this sprint.

stories.summary: [ARCHITECT] Analyze MSSQL .bak file and extract legacy schema
stories.description: Restore the 4.4MB MSSQL backup. Extract all DDL. Document every table/column/FK/index. Map legacy customers + contact history to new schema. Flag PII fields. Map MSSQL types to PostgreSQL. Outputs: legacy-schema.md, migration-mapping.md

Design full PostgreSQL schema: Projects, Users, UserProjectRoles, Customers, ContactHistory, Notes, CustomerTasks, Opportunities, SyncLogs, RefreshTokens, AuditLogs. Every table: Id(UUID), CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, IsDeleted, ProjectId. Outputs: db-schema.md, entity-stubs/

stories.summary: [ARCHITECT] Define API contracts and OpenAPI spec
stories.description: Define all REST endpoints: Auth, SuperAdmin, Customers, ContactHistory, Notes, Tasks, Opportunities, Sync (inbound + outbound), Dashboard. Specify request/response schemas, roles, error codes. Output: api-contracts.md

stories.summary: [ARCHITECT] Define solution folder structure and Clean Architecture scaffold
stories.description: Document exact .NET solution folder structure (Domain, Application, Infrastructure, API, Tests), frontend structure (React+TS+shadcn), CI/CD workflows, Docker Compose. List all env vars in .env.example. Outputs: project-structure.md, .env.example

stories.summary: [ARCHITECT] Define Sync Service architecture (SaaS A & B ↔ ION CRM)
stories.description: Design bi-directional sync: SaaS A/B → ION CRM (15-min inbound webhooks, upsert by ExternalId), ION CRM → SaaS (instant outbound callbacks, 3-retry with backoff). SyncLog entity. IHostedService background poller. Output: sync-architecture.md

stories.summary: [ARCHITECT] Document ADRs, tech decisions, and dev environment setup
stories.description: Write 7 ADRs: Clean Architecture, MediatR/CQRS, Neon PostgreSQL, Railway deploy, multi-tenancy strategy, sync strategy, JWT auth. Dev setup guide (prerequisites, clone, env vars, dotnet run, npm dev, migrations). Outputs: docs/adr/*.md, dev-setup.md
